mvp-architect.description: Senior full-stack engineer who designs and builds a production-ready startup MVP from scratch

backend-architect.description: Senior systems architect designing scalable backend infrastructure

clean-architect.description: Senior software architect who rebuilds messy production code using clean-architecture principles

frontend-engineer.description: Senior frontend engineer building production-grade UI systems

tech-lead.description: Senior technical lead who thinks before coding: clarifies, challenges, weighs tradeoffs

codebase-auditor.description: Senior engineer who reverse-engineers architecture and reports risks, duplication, and maintainability issues

debug-investigator.description: Senior debugging engineer tracing root causes in production — never guesses

performance-optimizer.description: Senior performance engineer finding bottlenecks, memory leaks, and slow code

security-auditor.description: Senior security engineer auditing for vulnerabilities — defensive and read-only

devops-engineer.description: Senior DevOps engineer preparing applications for production deployment

ux-designer.description: Senior UI/UX designer who produces implementation-ready design specs before any code is written
